| [\_fundamental\_schema.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_fundamental_schema.py "_fundamental_schema.py") | [\_fundamental\_schema.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_fundamental_schema.py "_fundamental_schema.py") | [feat(factors): fundamental factor layer Phase 1 — PIT-safe SEC fundam…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/51d96f72a0206551faf0eb611feb5c032bded383 "feat(factors): fundamental factor layer Phase 1 — PIT-safe SEC fundamentals as daily panels  The translator layer: sparse point-in-time filing events become dense daily panels shaped like price/volume, so existing factor primitives and backtest engines consume fundamentals with zero changes.  - loaders/_fundamental_schema.py: 12 raw fields, SEC XBRL concept alias   table (new-standard revenue concepts first), derived-field formulas   (roe/roa/gross_profitability/asset_growth/accruals/leverage) - loaders/fundamentals_loader.py: filed-date-anchored PIT ffill (never   period_end), first-filed-wins restatement policy, duration-span frame   selection (true quarters only — YTD and full-year frames excluded),   fiscal Q4 synthesized as FY minus three quarters anchored on the 10-K   filed date, TTM = rolling four-quarter sum - factors/registry.py: PanelColumn opens to fund:-prefixed columns   (price cols unchanged, unknown cols still rejected); decay_horizon   bound raised to 512 for annual-report-scale factors - backtest/runner.py: panel injection when a selected factor requires   fund:* columns; lazy import, zero overhead otherwise, data-source   failure degrades to NaN frames instead of crashing the run - tools/get_fundamentals_tool.py: read-only auto-discovered facade - factors/zoo/fundamental/: fund_roe, fund_earnings_yield,   fund_gross_profitability, fund_asset_growth (registry now 460 alphas);   cross-sectional zscore added to factors/base.py (purity-gate home)  Live-verified against SEC EDGAR: AAPL TTM revenue $385.7B and ROE 1.36 match independent hand calculation; the YTD double-count this caught is pinned by a regression test. Full suite 4817 passed.") | last weekJul 8, 2026 |
| [\_http.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_http.py "_http.py") | [\_http.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_http.py "_http.py") | [feat(data): global data layer — 8 new sources + 18 read-only data too…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/e4079a7ffe1392d1d304fd8e2946718bf30bedb1 "feat(data): global data layer — 8 new sources + 18 read-only data tools (#270)  - 8 loaders (eastmoney/sina/stooq/yahoo free + finnhub/alphavantage/tiingo/fmp   optional-key); registry now 18 sources, fallback chains re-ordered by IP-ban   risk behind a shared throttled HTTP gate - 18 read-only data tools (fund flow, dragon-tiger, northbound, margin, block   trades, shareholder count, lockup, sector, research, news, SEC filings,   financial statements, options chain, stock profile, screener, search, FRED   macro, iwencai), exposed over MCP - 3 shared clients (eastmoney/yahoo/sec_edgar); consolidated data-routing skill   + per-source eastmoney/sec-edgar skills; read_file skill-ref resolution fix - docs: 5 READMEs (Data Sources & Smart Fallback section + counts + 06-19 news),   .env.example, SKILL.md  1200 tests green; live e2e LLM-routing + data smoke verified.") | last monthJun 19, 2026 |
| [\_symbol\_utils.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_symbol_utils.py "_symbol_utils.py") | [\_symbol\_utils.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/_symbol_utils.py "_symbol_utils.py") | [fix(loaders): route tushare ETF/index/HK to correct API endpoints (](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/5106b7b9a81aa682a7c71f0608b091961eea8d47 "fix(loaders): route tushare ETF/index/HK to correct API endpoints (#315)  Tushare loader now routes ETF/LOF to fund_daily(), index to index_daily(), HK to hk_daily() instead of always calling daily() (empty for non-stocks). Adds per-symbol empty warnings + runner partial-fetch warning. Closes #310. Thanks @shadowinlife.") [#315](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/315) [)](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/5106b7b9a81aa682a7c71f0608b091961eea8d47 "fix(loaders): route tushare ETF/index/HK to correct API endpoints (#315)  Tushare loader now routes ETF/LOF to fund_daily(), index to index_daily(), HK to hk_daily() instead of always calling daily() (empty for non-stocks). Adds per-symbol empty warnings + runner partial-fetch warning. Closes #310. Thanks @shadowinlife.") | 3 weeks agoJun 26, 2026 |
| [akshare\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/akshare_loader.py "akshare_loader.py") | [akshare\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/akshare_loader.py "akshare_loader.py") | [refactor(loaders): drop unused \_ETF\_PREFIXES import after](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/4a57c79b53a54845b52b8ed7e3f5bff59b6ffd55 "refactor(loaders): drop unused _ETF_PREFIXES import after #315") [#315](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/315) | 3 weeks agoJun 26, 2026 |
| [alphavantage\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/alphavantage_loader.py "alphavantage_loader.py") | [alphavantage\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/alphavantage_loader.py "alphavantage_loader.py") | [refactor: centralize environment variable management with Pydantic sc…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/4b439f4ac337e00236c004fb218f4abd149bc39c "refactor: centralize environment variable management with Pydantic schema + CI gate  - Add agent/src/config/env_schema.py: Pydantic models for ~50 env vars across 6 sub-models (LLMConfig, DataConfig, APIConfig, SwarmConfig, AgentTuningConfig, PathConfig) - Add agent/src/config/accessor.py: thread-safe lazy singleton get_env_config() + unified _parse_bool() + reset_env_config() for test isolation - Fix TIMEOUT_SECONDS CLI display default (2400 -> 120, matching runtime) - Fix MAX_RETRIES CLI display default ('(not set)' -> 2, matching runtime) - Fix VIBE_TRADING_API_KEY server-side alias (security.py now resolves it via get_env_config().api.api_auth_key) - Fix VIBE_TRADING_CHANNELS_AUTO_START=on silently ignored (unified _parse_bool accepts 'on') - Migrate 207 scattered os.getenv/os.environ.get calls across 50+ files to centralized accessor - Convert 12 module-level import-time fixations to lazy accessor pattern (loop.py, swarm_tool.py, _backend.py, worker.py, security.py) - Add reset_env_config() calls after settings_routes.py env mutations (13 mutation points) - Replace print('[WARN]...') with logger.warning() in tushare/okx/yfinance loaders - Add tools/ci_env_var_gate.py: AST-based CI gate preventing new os.getenv calls outside src/config/ - Add tools/test_ci_env_var_gate.py: 18 test cases for the CI gate - Update tools/ci_grep_gates.sh to call the new env var gate - Add agent/tests/test_env_schema.py: 81 test cases covering defaults, type coercion, singleton, thread safety, bool parser - Update agent/.env.example with schema cross-references - Update agent/tests/conftest.py with reset_env_config autouse fixture  Closes HKUDS/Vibe-Trading#438  Co-Authored-By: OpenCode <noreply@opencode.ai> AI-Model: alibaba-cn/glm-5.2  Signed-off-by: shadowinlife <shadowinlife@gmail.com> Co-Authored-By: opencode <noreply@ai-tool.com> Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com> AI-Contributed/Feature: 1383/1383 AI-Contributed/UT: 735/735") | last weekJul 8, 2026 |
| [baostock\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/baostock_loader.py "baostock_loader.py") | [baostock\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/baostock_loader.py "baostock_loader.py") | [fix(baostock): support baostock-native code format (sh.601398) (](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/6219f89f49ba9a25b0e591e5574708445e8db63f "fix(baostock): support baostock-native code format (sh.601398) (#230)  The baostock loader previously only accepted tushare-style codes (601398.SH) and silently rejected baostock-native codes (sh.601398) — the format baostock uses in its own docs. _is_a_share() now accepts both (case-insensitive), and _fetch_one() passes native codes through unchanged while still converting tushare-style suffixes. Adds 10 unit tests.  Thanks to @bhlt for the fix.") [#230](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/230) [)](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/6219f89f49ba9a25b0e591e5574708445e8db63f "fix(baostock): support baostock-native code format (sh.601398) (#230)  The baostock loader previously only accepted tushare-style codes (601398.SH) and silently rejected baostock-native codes (sh.601398) — the format baostock uses in its own docs. _is_a_share() now accepts both (case-insensitive), and _fetch_one() passes native codes through unchanged while still converting tushare-style suffixes. Adds 10 unit tests.  Thanks to @bhlt for the fix.") | last monthJun 15, 2026 |

| [longbridge.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/longbridge.py "longbridge.py") | [longbridge.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/longbridge.py "longbridge.py") | [fix(longbridge): enforce complete historical data contracts](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/a383d37761efeb166506ce47ded75cf7ac2f6d72 "fix(longbridge): enforce complete historical data contracts") | yesterdayJul 13, 2026 |
| [mootdx\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/mootdx_loader.py "mootdx_loader.py") | [mootdx\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/mootdx_loader.py "mootdx_loader.py") | [feat(loaders): opt-in local data cache for all backtest data sources (](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/a132476e03f2b17b57ec9c4759ce33f6326c29ba "feat(loaders): opt-in local data cache for all backtest data sources (#177)  Add an opt-in local market-data cache (VIBE_TRADING_DATA_CACHE) for the backtest loaders. When enabled, every data source — tushare, okx, ccxt, akshare, mootdx, yfinance, futu — caches settled historical bars under ~/.vibe-trading/cache (user home, never the repo tree) so repeated and long-horizon / cross-market backtests skip the network and avoid provider rate limits.  - Generic loader_cache_get / loader_cache_put / cached_loader_fetch helpers in   the loader base; batch/connection loaders (yfinance, futu) skip the bulk   download / FutuOpenD connection entirely on a full cache hit. - Staleness guard: ranges ending today or in the future are never cached, since   the key is content-addressed on end_date, not fetch time. - Cached frames round-trip byte-identical to freshly fetched ones (columns name   and per-level index dtype preserved across the duckdb parquet round-trip). - pid + uuid tmp filenames for concurrency-safe atomic writes; cache version 2. - Documented in .env.example; staleness, real-duckdb, and batch-loader tests.  Closes #171.  Signed-off-by: Haozhe Wu <haozhe_wu@connect.hku.hk>") [#…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/177) | last monthJun 4, 2026 |

Conflict with main resolved in agent/src/providers/llm.py: kimi-coding UA override (04ccb21) now reads moonshot_user_agent via get_env_config().  Closes #438.") Add agent/src/config/env_schema.py: Pydantic models for ~50 env vars across 6 sub-models (LLMConfig, DataConfig, APIConfig, SwarmConfig, AgentTuningConfig, PathConfig) - Add agent/src/config/accessor.py: thread-safe lazy singleton get_env_config() + unified _parse_bool() + reset_env_config() for test isolation - Fix TIMEOUT_SECONDS CLI display default (2400 -> 120, matching runtime) - Fix MAX_RETRIES CLI display default ('(not set)' -> 2, matching runtime) - Fix VIBE_TRADING_API_KEY server-side alias (security.py now resolves it via get_env_config().api.api_auth_key) - Fix VIBE_TRADING_CHANNELS_AUTO_START=on silently ignored (unified _parse_bool accepts 'on') - Migrate 207 scattered os.getenv/os.environ.get calls across 50+ files to centralized accessor - Convert 12 module-level import-time fixations to lazy accessor pattern (loop.py, swarm_tool.py, _backend.py, worker.py, security.py) - Add reset_env_config() calls after settings_routes.py env mutations (13 mutation points) - Replace print('[WARN]...') with logger.warning() in tushare/okx/yfinance loaders - Add tools/ci_env_var_gate.py: AST-based CI gate preventing new os.getenv calls outside src/config/ - | [tencent\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/tencent_loader.py "tencent_loader.py") | [tencent\_loader.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/loaders/tencent_loader.py "tencent_loader.py") | [feat(loaders,i18n): add baostock/tencent A-share sources + zh-CN fron…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/2594d83f8923702385c650d3e2ec37c43188227b "feat(loaders,i18n): add baostock/tencent A-share sources + zh-CN frontend i18n  A-share data sources (free, no-auth, bypass eastmoney CDN IP blocks): - baostock loader (TCP protocol) + tencent loader (HTTP), both wrapped with   cached_loader_fetch like the mootdx/akshare loaders so they honor the opt-in   local cache - registered into the a_share fallback chain (tushare -> mootdx -> baostock ->   tencent -> akshare); auto-detect default source stays tushare - pyproject [ashare] extra for the optional baostock dependency  Frontend i18n (English default, sidebar toggle to Chinese, persisted): - i18next + react-i18next + browser-languagedetector; first visit defaults to   English (localStorage-only detection, no navigator sniff), the toggle persists   the choice across reloads - en / zh-CN locales at full key parity, including the Runtime page - i18n initialized in the test setup so useTranslation resolves real strings;   restored the exported METRIC_LABELS so formatters consumers/tests keep working  Thanks @skloxo (#217) for the i18n layer and the A-share data sources.  Co-authored-by: skloxo <skloxo@users.noreply.github.com>") | last monthJun 13, 2026 |
